title: config entrypoint does not work correctly
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------

**Description**

App with optional arguments fails, because the entrypoint config does not work correctly.
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Write app with an optional argument
2. Build with buildah script and the entrypoint config
3. Run the app without the argument


**Describe the results you received:**
App run fails, because the first entrypoint expression was delivered to the app as an argument:

```
usage: app.py [-h] [--color COLOR]
app.py: error: unrecognized arguments: python3
```

**Building with buildah and script**

```
Script snippet
...
buildah config --entrypoint '["python3", "app.py"]' $ctr
...
```
**==> App run fails**


**Inspect container snippet**
```
...
        "Path": "python3",
        "Args": [
            "app.py",
            "python3"
        ],
...
            "Cmd": [
                "python3"
            ],
            "Image": "localhost/app:test",
            "Volumes": null,
            "WorkingDir": "/opt/app",
            "Entrypoint": "python3 app.py",
            "OnBuild": null,
            "Labels": {
                "io.buildah.version": "1.11.6"
            },
...
```

**_but ..._**


**Building with buildah and Dockerfile**

```
Dockerfile snippet
...
ENTRYPOINT ["python3", "app.py"]
...
```
**==> App runs**


**Inspect container snippet**
```
...
        "Path": "python3",
        "Args": [
            "app.py"
        ],
...
            "Cmd": null,
            "Image": "localhost/app:test",
            "Volumes": null,
            "WorkingDir": "/opt/app",
            "Entrypoint": "python3 app.py",
            "OnBuild": null,
            "Labels": null,
...
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
App runs without passing an argument and inspect provides the following information:

```
...
        "Path": "python3",
        "Args": [
            "app.py"
        ],
...
            "Cmd": null,
            "Image": "localhost/app:test",
            "Volumes": null,
            "WorkingDir": "/opt/app",
            "Entrypoint": "python3 app.py",
            "OnBuild": null,
            "Labels": {
                "io.buildah.version": "1.11.6"
            },
...
```

**Output of `rpm -q buildah`:**

```
buildah-1.11.6-4.module_el8.1.0+272+3e64ee36.x86_64
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
Version:         1.11.6
Go Version:      go1.12.12
Image Spec:      1.0.1-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.0.1-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:
image Version:   5.0.0
Git Commit:
Built:           Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
CentOS Linux release 8.1.1911 (Core)
NAME="CentOS Linux"
VERSION="8 (Core)"
ID="centos"
ID_LIKE="rhel fedora"
VERSION_ID="8"
PLATFORM_ID="platform:el8"
PRETTY_NAME="CentOS Linux 8 (Core)"
ANSI_COLOR="0;31"
CPE_NAME="cpe:/o:centos:centos:8"
HOME_URL="https://www.centos.org/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.centos.org/"

CENTOS_MANTISBT_PROJECT="CentOS-8"
CENTOS_MANTISBT_PROJECT_VERSION="8"
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT="centos"
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT_VERSION="8"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux test.local 4.18.0-147.5.1.el8_1.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Feb 5 02:00:39 UTC 2020 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

comments.body:
This looks like it is fixed

buildah from scratch
 buildah config --entrypoint '["python3", "app.py"]' working-container
buildah inspect working-container
```
        "config": {
            "Entrypoint": [
                "python3",
                "app.py"
            ]
        },
...
            "Cmd": null,
```
